title: Hiyori and Yasuie Reveal Wano’s Pain
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Orochi Forces, Unknown person #10, Hyogoro, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as Hiyori’s identity and Yasuie’s sacrifice pull the Wano rebellion into a deeper emotional crisis.
scene: Zoro protects Toko and meets Hiyori, while Yasuie prepares a sacrifice meant to rescue the rebellion’s plan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What a boring match that'd be!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ARE THEY BLIND...? THIS WON'T BE THE END!! MUHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA

dialogue.speaker: Hyogoro
dialogue.text: Whaaaat!? Seriously!? Grandpa Hyogorou is so agile!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't hit him!! What's up with this guy!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: As if that'd work, you fool!! Armadi-guard!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ALPACA STYLE!! Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che Che

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I were to cause any more trouble for you....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even though you were caught... and forced into an execution game...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I've been stopping your punches short, shouting out "I did it wrong", over and over... what exactly are you-...!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's not like I don't want to punch them!! I just want to shoot out a punch powerful enough to push them back without touching them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I can do that, I think I'll be able to break through Kaido's tough scales....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I won't know for sure until I try!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Hiyori and Yasuie storyline with 44 dialogue beats. Hiyori and Yasuie bring the rebellion’s emotional history into the foreground.
